name: Lisas Hash Brown Quiche
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Home Style hash brown potatoes (Shredded-Ore-Ida)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the hash browns and squeeze out any moisture. Nuke them on defrost for a few minutes, then press in paper towels.
2. Press the hash browns into a quiche pan or 9-inch pie plate, coating the sides as well to form a crust.
3. Drizzle the edges to the center with melted butter.
4. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Bake the shell for 25 minutes.
5. While the shell is baking, combine the ham and cheese (or your choice of fillings).
6. In a bowl, blend together the half and half, salt, pepper, and eggs until well incorporated.
7. Remove the shell from the oven and add the ham mixture.
8. Pour in the egg mixture and return to the oven.
9. Bake for an additional 25-30 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
